title: elaphoglossum decoratum
intro: Elaphoglossum decoratum is a type of epiphytic fern, a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Elaphoglossum decoratum include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which may help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of this plant include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat fever and skin conditions; herbal preparations often involve infusions or decoctions made from the plant's leaves, which can be smoked or consumed as a tea.
